claim_boundary: Raw uncorrected log-SD Wald-z evidence for the exact phylo q1 sigma one-slope cell; fit and pdHess pass 100 percent, Wald MCSE <= 0.01, but intercept coverage is borderline low with upper-tail miss asymmetry, so this is inference_ready not supported; default location-axis bias+t correction does not apply to sigma.

Raw uncorrected log-SD Wald-z evidence for the phylo sigma:x member is conservative with MCSE <= 0.01; profile finite rate is low at g=8 and remains diagnostic only; this is not supported, and no profile-channel reliability, REML, AI-REML, or bridge claim is promoted; bias+t does not apply to sigma.

Raw uncorrected log-SD Wald-z evidence for the exact animal q1 sigma one-slope cell; fit and pdHess pass 100 percent, Wald finite rate is 0.981 and MCSE <= 0.01, but one-sided misses are asymmetric, so this is inference_ready not supported; pedigree/Ainv bridge marshalling, REML, and AI-REML are not promoted; bias+t does not apply to sigma.

Raw uncorrected log-SD Wald-z evidence for the animal sigma:x member is conservative with MCSE <= 0.01; profile finite rate is low at g=8 and remains diagnostic only; this is not supported, and no profile-channel reliability, pedigree/Ainv bridge, REML, or AI-REML claim is promoted; bias+t does not apply to sigma.
